cooldown_minutes.description: Minimum minutes between reports in every_n mode to prevent spam. Min 60.

daily_run_cap.description: Max reports generated per day. Defaults to 3.

deleted.description: Set to true to soft-delete this report config.

delivery_targets.description: List of delivery targets. Each is {type: 'email', value: '...'} or {type: 'slack', integration_id: N, channel: '...'}.

evaluation.description: UUID of the evaluation this report config belongs to.

frequency.description:
'every_n' triggers a report after N evaluations run; 'scheduled' uses an rrule schedule.

* `scheduled` - Scheduled
* `every_n` - Every N

id.description: A UUID string identifying this evaluation report.

max_sample_size.description: Max number of evaluation runs included in each report. Defaults to 100.

report_prompt_guidance.description: Optional custom instructions injected into the AI report prompt to focus analysis.

rrule.description: RFC 5545 recurrence rule string. Required when frequency is 'scheduled'.

starts_at.description: Schedule start datetime (ISO 8601). Required when frequency is 'scheduled'.

timezone_name.description: IANA timezone name for scheduled delivery (e.g. 'America/New_York').

trigger_threshold.description: Number of evaluation runs that trigger a report (every_n mode). Min 10, max 1000.
